corpus_building.implemented_as: The TXT paper is converted into a section-aware annotated mini-corpus.

tokenization.implemented_as: Every concept phrase and sentence is normalized into tokens for counts and n-grams.

normalization.implemented_as: Lower-casing and punctuation cleanup are used for phrase matching and deduplication.

n_gram.implemented_as: Concept length and document top unigrams/bigrams/trigrams are exposed.

bow_and_naive_bayes.implemented_as: Section BoW hits act as class-conditional section evidence for intro/method/experiment/conclusion style decisions.

tf_idf_document_term_matrix.implemented_as: Document-level frequency and TF-IDF matrices expose which section concepts are characteristic of this paper.

laplace_smoothing.implemented_as: P(section | concept) uses add-one smoothing, so unseen section-concept pairs are not forced to zero.

evidence_cue_lexicon.implemented_as: Cue phrases such as propose, achieve, outperform, and BLEU give transparent rule-based evidence hints.

sequence_labeling.implemented_as: The first model contributes BIO boundary evidence for concept phrase extraction.

canonicalization_noisy_channel_style.implemented_as: Observed surface phrases are mapped to canonical terms with an alias confidence score.

location.sentence: To evaluate L 0 for images, we assume that each color component is divided into 256 bins, and we compute the probability of p θ ( x 0 | x 1 ) landing in the correct bin (which is tractable using the CDF of the Gaussian distribution).

context_window.previous: However, since q ( x t − 1 | x t ) depends on the entire data distribution, we approximate it using a neural network as follows: p θ ( x t − 1 | x t ) := N ( x t − 1 ; μ θ ( x t , t ) , Σ θ ( x t , t )) (3) The combination of q and p is a variational auto-encoder (Kingma & Welling, 2013), and we can write the variational lower bound (VLB) as follows: L vlb := L 0 + L 1 + ... + L T − 1 + L T (4) L 0 := − log p θ ( x 0 | x 1 ) (5) L t − 1 := D KL ( q ( x t − 1 | x t , x 0 ) || p θ ( x t − 1 | x t )) (6) L T := D KL ( q ( x T | x 0 ) || p ( x T )) (7) Aside from L 0 , each term of Equation 4 is a KL divergence between two Gaussians, and can thus be evaluated in closed form.
context_window.current: To evaluate L 0 for images, we assume that each color component is divided into 256 bins, and we compute the probability of p θ ( x 0 | x 1 ) landing in the correct bin (which is tractable using the CDF of the Gaussian distribution).
context_window.next: Also note that while L T does not depend on θ , it will be close to zero if the forward noising process adequately destroys the data distribution so that q ( x T | x 0 ) ≈ N (0 , I ) .

top_candidates.sentence: However, they found that choosing a better network architecture removed the need for this adversarial objective, suggesting that the adversarial objective is not necessary for powerful generative modeling.
We additionally use precision and recall to compare how well DDPMs and GANs cover the target distribution.
We additionally use precision and recall to compare how well DDPMs and GANs cover the target distribution.

We use the improved precision and recall metrics and discover that diffusion models achieve much higher recall for similar FID, suggesting that they do indeed cover a much larger portion of the target distribution.

We use the improved precision and recall metrics and discover that diffusion models achieve much higher recall for similar FID, suggesting that they do indeed cover a much larger portion of the target distribution.
We have also found that DDPMs can match the sample quality of GANs while achieving much better mode coverage as measured by recall.
We have also found that DDPMs can match the sample quality of GANs while achieving much better mode coverage as measured by recall.

downstream_contract.intended_use: Feed this JSON to a later local open-source model to write an overview.
downstream_contract.grounding_rule: The downstream generator should write from evidence_units.location.sentence and context_window, not from unsupported outside knowledge.
downstream_contract.score_warning: Scores are ranking and filtering signals, not calibrated probabilities.
